programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Oscar is asked to be a school bus driver for the day; the kids may not be the only ones who need a lesson in good behavior.

programme.title: Corner Gas
programme.desc: Brent meets a new member of his extended family; Karen helps Wanda showcase her math skills; Ruby makes menu changes.

programme.title: The Wolverine
programme.desc: Lured to a Japan he hasn't seen since World War II, century-old mutant Wolverine (Hugh Jackman) finds himself in a shadowy realm of yakuza and samurai. Wolverine is pushed to his physical and emotional brink when he is forced to go on the run with a powerful industrialist's daughter (Tao Okamoto) and is confronted -- for the first time -- with the prospect of death. As he struggles to rediscover the hero within himself, he must grapple with powerful foes and the ghosts of his own haunted past.

programme.title: Just for Laughs: Gags
programme.desc: There's no sound, but there sure are plenty of laughs; Quebec-based troupe uses the city as its stage, and its inhabitants, or victims, as characters.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unassuming people enter a taxi cab as simple passengers taking a normal ride, only to be shocked when they discover that they're instant contestants; passengers win money by answering trivia questions.

programme.title: Cash Cab
programme.desc: Unassuming people enter a taxi cab as simple passengers taking a normal ride, only to be shocked when they discover that they're instant contestants. The host, Adam Grove, asks the passengers trivia questions as he escorts them to their destination.

programme.title: The Bold and the Beautiful
programme.desc: Set in the glamorous world of the Los Angeles fashion scene, this soap opera focuses on the wealthy and powerful Forrester family; its company, Forrester Creations, is the leader in the fashion industry.
